title: JDBC Tutorial
summary: I have updated the JDBC tutorial introduction quite a bit. Now it contains a list of popular relational databases, a full JDBC example, and a better explanation of what JDBC is intended for, among other things.
content: I have updated the JDBC tutorial introduction quite a bit. Now it contains a list of popular relational databases, a full JDBC example, and a better explanation of what JDBC is intended for, among other things.
